title: Welcome to the FinLead AI blog
excerpt: A simple repo-backed publishing flow for notes, product updates, and insurance operations insights.
content:
This blog is stored directly in the repository as JSON files. Each post can be created from the hidden /blog/admin page, committed, reviewed, and published with the site.

Use this space for product updates, insurance operations learnings, and thought pieces that support the FinLead AI story.
author: FinLead AI
